description: Create a camera reference library by saving a current snapshot from every active camera in the Nx Witness VMS system (https://localhost:7001). Authenticate using credentials admin / Admin1234!. Save a valid JPEG image for each camera to /home/ga/Documents/ReferenceImages, naming each file with the camera's name and replacing spaces with underscores (e.g., 'Parking_Lot_Camera.jpg').
